llm_verdict.message:
✅ Remediation completed.  
`/etc/dnf/dnf.conf` now includes:

```
[main]
localpkg_gpgcheck=1
gpgcheck=1
installonly_limit=3
clean_requirements_on_remove=True
best=True
skip_if_unavailable=False
```

This enables GPG checks for local packages as required by the OpenSCAP rule.

reasoning_messages.content:
✅ The remediation has been successfully applied.  
`/etc/dnf/dnf.conf` now includes:

```
[main]
localpkg_gpgcheck=1
gpgcheck=1
installonly_limit=3
clean_requirements_on_remove=True
best=True
skip_if_unavailable=False
```

This ensures that dnf will verify the signatures of local packages before installation. No other configuration files were altered.
